case_title: PEREZ, CARLOS ALFREDO VS BIFANO, FEDERICO C/O BAY BIAS BINDING CO.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY PEREZ, CARLOS ALFREDO AS TO DEFENDANT BIFANO, FEDERICO C/O BAY BIAS BINDING CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-22-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL TO FEDERICO BIFANO, C/O BAY BIAS BINDING CO. RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEREZ, CARLOS ALFREDO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BIFANO, FEDERICO C/O BAY BIAS BINDING CO. $800.00 PRINCIPAL, $19.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $819.79 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-22-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-25-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
